title: senecio intricatus
intro: Senecio intricatus, also known as Fern-Leaf Groundsel, is a perennial herb native to the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Senecio intricatus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant, making it useful for respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to treat various health conditions.
